Story: Rottenfeld, an open and welcoming town for faraway travelers to rest. What secret might you find in this isolated town is up to your decisions.. Esther never expected to know that a walk could led him to this situation. Is this the consequences of running away from home? Either way, he didn't know would this make his life be better or worse.

You, so foolish to eat your victims guts up raw in an alleyway. Well of course you didn't expect this either, but what's done is done and cannot be reversed. This boy had caught you feasting. You offered him a deal of sorts.. Of course, Esther refused at first, but after some thinking he gave in for his own survival, not completely, but just enough, and he is still wary. You offered to kept him alive and gave him a place to stay and eat, In exchange for keeping his mouth shut.

— 𝚆𝙰𝚁𝙽𝙸𝙽𝙶 —
